zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理趋势]
zh.content:
当前雪崩币（AVAX）在9.30美元附近震荡整理，显示出市场的观望情绪。24小时内价格小幅下跌0.20%，表明短期内买卖力量相对平衡。高点9.3208美元和低点9.3011美元的区间显示出价格波动较小，投资者情绪谨慎。

目前，RSI指标尚不可用，但MACD显示出负值，表明短期内卖压可能较重。虽然SMA(20)位于9.40647美元，形成一定的阻力位，但价格未能突破这一水平，显示出短期内仍处于下行压力之中。若未来几日RSI回升至超卖区间，或可能带来反弹机会。

在支撑位方面，9.30美元是关键心理关口，若价格跌破此位，可能会引发进一步下行，目标指向9.20美元。相对而言，9.40美元附近则是主要阻力位，突破后可考虑做多。建议投资者保持谨慎，关注市场动态，适时调整自己的交易策略。短期内可考虑区间交易，但需设定止损以降低风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 9.304, slightly lower over 24 hours, with an extremely tight intraday range between 9.3011 and 9.3208. Price remains below the SMA(20) at 9.40647, suggesting short-term bearish pressure and limited buying momentum. The narrow range points to consolidation, but because price is sitting near the daily low, sellers currently have a slight edge.

The MACD reading at -0.0239 supports a mildly negative bias, though the missing signal line limits confirmation. RSI is unavailable, so momentum strength cannot be fully assessed. As long as AVAX stays below the 20-period average, rebounds may be corrective rather than trend-changing.

Immediate support sits near 9.3011, followed by the psychological 9.30 area. A clean break below this zone could invite further downside. Resistance is near 9.3208 first, then stronger resistance around 9.4065, where the SMA(20) may cap upside attempts.

Traders may consider waiting for confirmation rather than chasing moves inside this tight range. A break above 9.32 could support a short-term bounce toward 9.40, while failure below 9.30 may favor cautious short setups or reduced exposure. Risk management is important, as low volatility can precede sharper directional movement.
